payload.author: Bri
payload.body: RATIFIED (architecture review). Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY as the v1 fan-out bus (same txn as the append; graduate to NATS on saturation); KEEP SSE (push goes through HTTP, WebSocket buys nothing); add id:<tenant>:<seq> + Last-Event-ID resume (the confirmed real defect). LAN self-healing retired in cloud -> LB + /healthz. The earlier 'web has no EventSource' claim was already CORRECTED (it does; src/web/app.js:581). Child stories SCP-146..150 accepted. Spike closed.
